options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -area
options.description: List of area in which fillers are to be inserted

options.name: -cell
options.description: List of filler cells

options.name: -check_signal_drc
options.description: DRC checking after filler insertion

options.name: -createRows
options.description: Create rows for filler cell techSites which do not have rows in the floor plan

options.name: -diffCellViol
options.description: Check violations between different cell types

options.name: -ecoMode
options.description: Fillers inserted in ecoFlow

options.name: -fitGap
options.description: Chooses combinations of filler cells avoiding creating single-width gaps

options.name: -fixDRC
options.description: Corrects DRC violations on fillers reported by verifyGeometry

options.name: -fix_horizontal_max_length_violation
options.description: fix horizontal max length violation

options.name: -fix_vertical_max_length_violation
options.description: fix vertical stack max length violation

options.name: -honorPrerouteAsObs
options.description: Filler command honors setPrerouteAsObs value

options.name: -markFixed
options.description: Mark inserted fillers as pre-placed

options.name: -merge
options.description: DRC checking with -merge option passed to verifyGeometry

options.name: -minHole
options.description: DRC checking with -minHole option passed to verifyGeometry

options.name: -powerDomain
options.description: Power domain for which fillers are to be inserted

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Prefix of fillers to inserted

options.name: -prevent_vertical_stack_max_length_violation
options.description: add repair filler to cut vertical stack to prevent its max length violation

options.name: -util
options.description: Utilization factor

options.name: -viaEnclosure
options.description: DRC checking with -viaEnclosure option passed to verifyGeometry
